cards.back: Reusable pieces of code that can be instantiated with different types to provide generic programming

cards.front: What is the primary use of templates
cards.back: To create generic algorithms and data structures that can work with different data types

cards.front: What is the benefit of using templates
cards.back: Increased flexibility, generic code that can work with different data types without modification

cards.front: What are the two main types of templates
What is the purpose of template metaprogramming
cards.back: To perform computations at compile-time, rather than runtime, to improve performance and reduce overhead
